name: open-play-map
description: Static Open Play Map prototype for pickleball open play locations.

scripts.check: python3 -m html.parser index.html && python3 -m html.parser about.html && python3 -m html.parser account.html && python3 -m html.parser leaderboard.html && python3 -m html.parser admin.html && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/admin.js && node --check src/account.js && node --check src/leaderboard.js && node --check src/mobile-header.js
